title: Migrate an auth policy without lockout or widening
description: Change permission models behind tests and a compatibility window so no role is silently widened or locked out.
body: Steps: 1. Snapshot the current effective permissions (matrix tests green). 2. Introduce the new policy in shadow/dual-read, comparing decisions against the old one. 3. Log and review any divergence before cutover. 4. Cut over behind a flag with a fast rollback. 5. Remove the old path only after the divergence log is clean. Rollback point: the flag. Validation: divergence log shows no unintended allow; lockout tests for each role pass.
